source: Confirmed from D1 hunter_sheets (migrated from local, 2026-03-11). Dynamic state (harm, luck, xp, bonds, checks) lives in D1 — this file is the static identity layer only.

hunters.name: Rex Bangley

area_of_study.name: Violence
area_of_study.effect: May roll +Sharp instead of +Tough for kick some ass. When making a scientific attack, either do +1 harm or take +1 forward.

hunters.luck_special: When you spend a point of Luck, some gadget or machine near you will soon malfunction, break down, or explode (what exactly is up to the Keeper).
hunters.background: Research leader and field operative. Area of expertise: serial killers (pre-PORTAL). Loves tinkering and gadget creation equally with field action.

arc_hooks: University rival Dan Nilsson is working for MESA — Rex does not know this yet.
Rex examining a MESA Anchor Spike or Substance Θ sample would immediately recognise the BIM signature — direct Project Veil breadcrumb.
Area of Study: Violence means Rex can roll Sharp for kick some ass — significant in MESA confrontations.

hunters.name: Reed Atwood
hunters.luck_special: Whenever you spend a Luck point, you'll get a chance to do something heroic.
hunters.background: Idolises Rex Bangley. Avoids being a burden; gets into trouble by not asking for help. Can be manipulated by appeals to what will make the group happy.

arc_hooks: Director Leech has been contacting Reed separately — Reed may carry a private directive the team doesn't know about. Not yet surfaced in play.
CAMPBELL knows about the Leech-Reed contact pattern, won't lie if asked directly but won't volunteer it.
Teddy Brandt notices things — closest to knowing Reed is carrying something.

hunters.name: Alan Frazier
hunters.luck_special: When you spend a point of Luck, something or someone related to your inhuman heritage or human upbringing shows up soon.
hunters.background: Swapped at birth, raised by a human family who have since died. Powers triggered by one of Rex's experiments. Has been accumulating evidence of thin-boundary locations.

items_of_note.name: Diane Marsh's notebook
items_of_note.description: Contains a threshold sketch Alan recognises as meaningful. Acquired in Session 02.
items_of_note.significance: Long thread — who mapped the thresholds first, and why can Alan read the map?

arc_hooks: Alan reads place the way fey characters do — by resonance and layered memory.
The Cartographer case is NOT about illusion — Alan's glamour powers don't apply. His gift is his nature.
Diane Marsh's notebook contains a threshold sketch he recognises — major long-arc thread.

hunters.name: Sven
hunters.luck_special: When you spend Luck, your monster side gains power; your Curse may become stronger, or another Breed disadvantage may manifest.
hunters.background: Died on an ayahuasca trip — cause unknown. Visions from the trip turned out to be real. Motivated by finding exciting applications of monsters. Immune to the Aldermoor displacement effect (no cognitive map).
special_properties: Immune to Aldermoor displacement effect — has no cognitive map to consume.
An entity recognised him at a boundary during Session 02.
An Anchor Spike used against him deals 3-harm and forces him out of any supernatural state for the rest of the scene. The user will know what he is.

arc_hooks: Cause of death unknown — deliberately left open. Should connect to at least one active thread.
Natural contact vector for The Cartographer — entity recognises him as something between states.
Natural resolution vector for Case E (The Understudies).
MESA has a file on Sven — Rook identified him as non-biological on first meeting.

hunters.name: John Johnson
hunters.luck_special: When you spend a point of Luck, pick an aspect of the current situation. The Keeper will tell you what other conspiracies that aspect connects to.
hunters.background: Lab staff, not field ops. Believes everything is a hoax and everything is connected. Currently pursuing independent research threads — MESA shell company patterns, Campbell identity theories, lab ethics. Role in active cases undefined; most likely involvement is intelligence and pattern analysis.

arc_hooks: Most likely character to notice the MESA acronym pattern across shell company names.
